{{CargoClone
|name=Lord of Pain
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=184
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Micro Incubator: Convert Blue product to Purple by + 0.3%
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Zombie Minion Skin ATK +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Zombie Minion Skin ATK +50%
|}}
